question.text: If a person under sub-clause (c) of clause (2) fails to satisfy the 'fit and proper person' criteria, such person must divest their holding within what period?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per the Fit and Proper Criteria section, if a person under sub-clause (c) fails the criteria, the intermediary shall ensure such person divests their holding within six months. **The Trap:** The 30-day replacement requirement applies to sub-clause (b) persons, not sub-clause (c). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** During the interim period, such persons must not exercise any voting rights.
